g.text: North star: secure the market and own distribution
We are mediators — vendors are partners, couriers are ours, customers are the prize

svg.text: Payment released to chef + rider only after customer confirms delivery (or 10-min auto-release)

g.text: No charge until vendor is earning
Feedback loop — the product never stops improving
Customers, chefs, and riders all have a feedback channel in the app from day one
Every update is driven by what they tell us — not what we assume
